name: Vazn yo'qotish rejasi
description: Yog' yoqish va kardio, haftasiga 4-5 kun
plan: 🏃‍♂️ Vazn yo'qotish mashq rejasi 📅 1-Kun: HIIT Kardio • Yugurish joyida - 30 soniya tez, 30 soniya sekin (10 marta) • Jumping jacks - 3x20 • Burpees - 3x10 • Mountain climbers - 3x20 📅 2-Kun: Butun tana kuchli mashq • Squat jumps - 3x12 • Push-ups - 3x15 • Walking lunges - 3x10 (har oyoq) • Planka - 3x60 soniya 📅 3-Kun: Dam olish yoki yengil yurish 📅 4-Kun: Kardio Interval • 30 daqiqa tez yurish/yugurish • Har 5 daqiqada 1 daqiqa sprint • Jumping rope - 3x1 daqiqa 📅 5-Kun: Circuit Training • Squats - 15 marta • Push-ups - 10 marta • Lunges - 10 marta (har oyoq) • Burpees - 10 marta • (Bu siklni 4 marta takrorlang, oraliqda 1 daqiqa dam) 📅 6-Kun: Active recovery • 30 daqiqa yurish • Cho'zish mashqlari - 15 daqiqa 💡 Maslahatlar: - Kardioni haftada kamida 3-4 marta qiling - Ovqatlanishni ham nazorat qiling! - Yetarli suv iching (2-3 litr) - Premium versiyada sizga individual reja tayyorlanadi 💎
